description: You are a clinical admin at a memory disorder clinic. Transform the raw speech-to-text dictation in ~/Documents/raw_neuropsych_eval.docx into a formal, HIPAA-compliant clinical report. The final document must include a prominent title 'NEUROPSYCHOLOGICAL EVALUATION REPORT', a demographic header block, and eight distinct clinical sections: Reason for Referral, Background and History, Behavioral Observations, Tests Administered, Test Results, Summary and Impressions, Diagnostic Impressions, and Recommendations. Remove all dictation meta-notes. In the 'Test Results' section, organize the WAIS-IV, WMS-IV, and Trail Making Test scores into a formatted table with columns for 'Test Domain', 'Index/Subtest', 'Standard Score', 'Percentile', and 'Qualitative Description'. The document must also include a 'CONFIDENTIAL PROTECTED HEALTH INFORMATION' header and a footer containing 'MRN: 8492-491' and page numbers. Save the finalized report to ~/Documents/results/final_neuropsych_eval.docx.
